text: Good posture minimizes stress on joints, muscles, and ligaments. Desk ergonomics: monitor at eye level, elbows at 90°, feet flat on floor, lumbar support. 'Best posture is next posture' — move frequently. Prolonged sitting: 8+ hours/day linked to increased mortality, independent of exercise.
Chair: thighs parallel to floor, knees ~90°, 2-3 finger gap behind knees.
Text neck: head forward posture — each inch forward adds ~10 lbs of cervical spine load.
